quiz.title: Ticking Clocks and Turning Calendar - Chapter 12 Quiz

questions.questionText: Which hand on a clock shows the hour?
questions.explanation: The short hand (hour hand) shows the hour. It moves slowly from one number to the next. The long hand shows the minutes.
hints: The hour hand is shorter because hours change slowly

questions.questionText: How many minutes are in 1 hour?
questions.explanation: There are 60 minutes in 1 hour. The minute hand goes all the way around the clock once in 60 minutes.
hints: Count by 5s all the way around the clock: 5, 10, 15... up to?

questions.questionText: When the minute hand points to 6 on a clock, how many minutes past the hour is it?
questions.explanation: When the minute hand is on 6, it is 30 minutes past the hour (half past). Count by 5s from 12 to 6: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30.

questions.questionText: What does 'quarter past 9' mean in numbers?
questions.explanation: Quarter past 9 means 9:15. A quarter of an hour is 15 minutes. The minute hand is on 3 (which is 15 minutes past).
hints: A quarter of 60 minutes is 15 minutes

questions.questionText: True or False: 8:00 AM is in the morning.
questions.explanation: True! AM covers the time from midnight to noon. 8:00 AM is in the morning, which is when most children go to school.
hints: AM means the morning hours before noon

questions.questionText: How many hours are in one full day?
questions.explanation: There are 24 hours in one full day. A day has 12 hours of AM (midnight to noon) and 12 hours of PM (noon to midnight). The hour hand goes around the clock face twice in a full day.
hints: The clock shows 12 hours, but a full day is longer

questions.questionText: A cartoon show starts at 5:00 PM and ends at 5:30 PM. How long is the show?
questions.explanation: The show starts at 5:00 PM and ends at 5:30 PM. The elapsed time is 5:30 - 5:00 = 30 minutes.

questions.questionText: School starts at 8:00 AM and ends at 2:00 PM. How many hours is the school day?
questions.explanation: Count from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM: 8 to 9, 9 to 10, 10 to 11, 11 to 12, 12 to 1, 1 to 2 = 6 hours.
hints: Count the hours from 8 to 2, going through noon

questions.questionText: How many days are in a week?
questions.explanation: There are 7 days in a week: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, and Sunday.
hints: Start counting from Monday to Sunday

questions.questionText: How many months are in a year?
questions.explanation: There are 12 months in a year: January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, and December.
hints: Start from January and count all the way to December

questions.questionText: Which month has the fewest days?
questions.explanation: February has the fewest days - 28 days normally and 29 days in a leap year. April, June, and September all have 30 days.
hints: Think about which month is the shortest

questions.questionText: True or False: A leap year comes once every 4 years.
questions.explanation: True! A leap year comes every 4 years. In a leap year, February has 29 days instead of 28. Examples: 2020, 2024, 2028 are all leap years.
hints: Think of recent years you may know are leap years

questions.questionText: If a movie starts at 4:15 PM and lasts 2 hours, what time does it end?
questions.explanation: Start at 4:15 PM and add 2 hours. 4:15 + 1 hour = 5:15. 5:15 + 1 hour = 6:15. The movie ends at 6:15 PM.

questions.questionText: If today is Thursday, what day will it be after 7 days?
questions.explanation: After exactly 7 days (one complete week), it will be the same day - Thursday! A week always brings you back to the same day.
hints: How many days are in one complete week?

questions.questionText: How many days does January have?
questions.explanation: January has 31 days. You can use the knuckle trick to remember - January falls on a knuckle, which means 31 days.
hints: Use the knuckle trick - the first knuckle is January

questions.questionText: What does 'quarter to 7' mean in number form?
questions.explanation: Quarter to 7 means 15 minutes before 7 o'clock, which is 6:45. The minute hand is on 9 and the hour hand is almost at 7.
hints: Quarter to means 15 minutes before the next hour

questions.questionText: If today is Tuesday and a test is after 10 days, on what day will the test be?
questions.explanation: 10 days = 1 week (7 days) + 3 extra days. After 7 days, it is still Tuesday. Then count 3 more: Wednesday (8), Thursday (9), Friday (10). The test is on Friday!
hints: Divide 10 by 7 to find complete weeks and extra days

questions.questionText: True or False: 3:00 PM is in the morning.
questions.explanation: False! 3:00 PM is in the afternoon, not the morning. PM means the time after noon. 3:00 AM would be in the early morning (night time).
